title: chore(rename): BaselineOfClaudeMessaging → BaselineOfClaudeSDK
description: Rename Metacello baseline class for dual-scope SDK. Move src/BaselineOfClaudeMessaging/BaselineOfClaudeMessaging.class.st → src/BaselineOfClaudeSDK/BaselineOfClaudeSDK.class.st. Consumer URL: baseline: 'ClaudeMessaging' → baseline: 'ClaudeSDK'. Update README install snippet, CLAUDE.md, ROADMAP. Tag v0.5.1 (breaking-name rename, no API surface change).
close_reason: PR #21 squash 45c0e2c. BaselineOfClaudeMessaging → BaselineOfClaudeSDK rename + consumer URL update. Tests 770/770. Lint clean. Tag v0.5.1 pushed at merge commit. release.yml will fire and publish v0.5.1 release with rebuilt PDFs.

title: feat(examples): ClaudeMessagingBatchesExample for v0.6 Batches API
description: v0.6.0 Batches shipped without a runnable example in Claude-Messaging-Examples. Add ClaudeMessagingBatchesExample covering: build ClaudeBatchCreateParams with N requests, createBatch: → ClaudeBatch, pollBatch:untilEndedEvery: until isEnded, streamBatchResults:do: with polymorphic outcome dispatch (isSucceeded/isErrored/isCanceled/isExpired). Doctest-runnable build helpers + uploadOn:/runOn: pattern matching the Skills/MCP example shape. One test class. Ship as small standalone PR off main.

title: chore(setup): resume-2026-04-29 + CLAUDE.md verification pass
description: Make anthropic-sdk-pharo ready for a fresh agent session to continue work without monorepo context. Light CLAUDE.md verification pass + write docs/resumes/resume-2026-04-29.md covering current state + open beads in priority order + launch instructions + scope boundary.
close_reason: PR #19 squash 1fadae7. CLAUDE.md verification pass + docs/resumes/resume-2026-04-29.md (270 lines) shipped. Round 2 fixed Postern dep claim + 4ov-on-merge framing.

title: feat(messaging): v0.6.0 Batches API
description: Anthropic's async-Messages submission. Submit batched Messages requests, poll for completion, retrieve results. Same request shape as Messages, different endpoint family. Reference: anthropic-sdk-python beta/messages/batches.py + anthropic-sdk-go betamessagebatch.go. Target package: Claude-Messaging-Batches. ROADMAP v0.6.0.
notes: Design doc shipped via PR #20 (squash 6f5ebd6) at docs/designs/v0.6-batches-design.md. 13 production classes, package Claude-Messaging-Batches, extension methods on ClaudeClient per ADR-42, buffered JSONL line reader. Implementation in PR #22 (feat/v0.6-batches), shipping as v0.6.0.
close_reason: PR #22 squash bf488a0. v0.6.0 Batches API shipped: 14 production classes in Claude-Messaging-Batches, 15 test classes in -Tests, 9 ClaudeClient extension methods (createBatch:/getBatch:/listBatches/listBatches:/cancelBatch:/deleteBatch:/streamBatchResults:do:/pollBatch:untilEndedEvery:/newBatchHttpClient), polymorphic ClaudeBatchResult dispatch, structurally retry-safe streamBatchResults:do: (parse-then-iterate inside executeWithRetry:), OS-assigned port 0 in mock-server tests, ADR-43 graduated to DESIGN.md, ClaudeBetaHeader>>messageBatches catalog entry, ClaudeBatchNotEndedError. Tests 838/838 in fresh-rebuilt image. make lint exit 0. Tag v0.6.0 pushed; release.yml will fire and publish v0.6.0 release with rebuilt PDFs.

title: chore(rename): local dir claude-messaging-pharo → anthropic-sdk-pharo
description: Rename on-disk directory to match GitHub repo. Update Makefile's two Iceberg registry lookups (r name = 'claude-messaging-pharo' → 'anthropic-sdk-pharo'). Document upgrade path for existing local clones (re-clone or git-mv + Iceberg remap).

title: feat(managed-agents): v0.9.0 Agents (beta)
description: The Managed Agents resource itself — Anthropic-hosted agentic runtime. Composes sessions + memory stores + skills + tools. Depends on v0.7 + v0.8 having shipped. Target package: Claude-ManagedAgents-Agents. ROADMAP v0.9.0.

title: feat(managed-agents): v0.7.0 Sessions (beta)
description: Server-side stateful conversation primitive. First Claude-ManagedAgents-* package. Reference: anthropic-sdk-python beta/sessions/. Target package: Claude-ManagedAgents-Sessions. ROADMAP v0.7.0. Beta header: managed-agents-2026-04-01.

title: feat(managed-agents): v0.8.0 Memory Stores (beta)
description: Persistent memory resource. Used by Managed Agents and standalone for retrieval-augmented workflows. Target package: Claude-ManagedAgents-MemoryStores. ROADMAP v0.8.0.

title: feat(managed-agents): v0.10.0 Environments (beta)
description: Execution environments for Managed Agents (sandbox configuration, container settings, network policy). Target package: Claude-ManagedAgents-Environments. ROADMAP v0.10.0.

title: feat(messaging): v1.0.0 parity verification gate
description: Final verification: feature parity with anthropic-sdk-python on the published v1.x scope (Messages + Files + Skills + MCP + server tools + Batches + Managed Agents stack). Stability promise: no breaking changes within v1.x unless Anthropic deprecates the underlying endpoint. Tag v1.0.0.

description: Per design doc §16: atomic PR on monorepo deleting 9 Claude-Messaging-* + 9 -Tests + PharoKeyring* packages, updating slow-suite.yml test expression to ClaudeAgentTestSuite fullSuite, dropping messaging-specification.tex from monorepo docs.yml, updating Makefile LOAD_PACKAGES_EXPR. DEFERRED until anthropic-sdk-pharo lands rename + ADRs + baseline + v0.6 Batches. P3 reflects deferred status; promote when ready.
close_reason: Bead misplaced. Cutover work happens IN the monorepo, not here. Replaced by claude-agent-sdk-smalltalk-5lb0 in monorepo's bd.

title: feat(managed-agents): v0.11.0 User Profiles + Vaults (beta)
description: user_profiles (per-user identity for agents) + vaults (secret storage). Target packages: Claude-ManagedAgents-UserProfiles, Claude-ManagedAgents-Vaults. ROADMAP v0.11.0.

title: docs(design): ADRs for two-family naming Claude-Messaging-* + Claude-ManagedAgents-*
description: Capture in DESIGN.md the naming policy aligned with Anthropic's vocabulary. ADR 1: two package families — Claude-Messaging-* (Messages API surface, existing) + Claude-ManagedAgents-* (Anthropic's beta Managed Agents API: sessions, memory_stores, agents, environments, user_profiles, vaults). ADR 2: ClaudeClient in Claude-Messaging-Client gains Managed-Agents methods via Pharo extension methods from Claude-ManagedAgents-* packages. ADR 3: 'ManagedAgents' chosen to align with Anthropic's docs vocabulary AND to disambiguate from the monorepo's Claude-Agent-* local in-image runtime. Updates CLAUDE.md naming + ROADMAP entries (v0.7-v0.11 packages list new prefix).
close_reason: PR #18 squash 18be3bc. ADR-40/41/42 added to DESIGN.md (two package families, ManagedAgents vocab, ClaudeClient extension methods). CLAUDE.md naming section restructured. ROADMAP v0.7-v0.11 packages enumerated. Round 2 fixed three Copilot findings: ADR/CLAUDE.md groups in future-tense, extension-method category convention corrected (* + defining package name verbatim).
